mapper.insert: INSERT INTO slip_media ( slip_id, media_name, project_name, release_date, note ) VALUES ( #{slipId}, #{mediaName}, #{projectName}, #{releaseDate}, #{note} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, slip_id AS slipId, media_name AS mediaName, project_name AS projectName, release_date AS releaseDate, note FROM slip_media WHERE slip_id = #{slipId} ORDER BY id
